title: Pan-Seared Mushrooms with Earthy Flair
description: A simple yet satisfying dish showcasing the rich flavors of earthy mushrooms, perfect for a cozy evening.

ingredients.name: mushrooms
ingredients.notes: any variety works well, but earthy ones like cremini or shiitake are preferred

instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the mushrooms and cook, stirring occasionally, until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Sprinkle salt, black pepper, and thyme over the mushrooms. Stir to combine.
Continue cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the mushrooms are tender and the liquid has evaporated.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh thyme if desired.
Optional: Serve with crusty bread or over rice for a more filling meal.
